plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs to eliminate extreme risk.
Reduce semiconductor exposure significantly.
Increase allocation to income-generating ETF.
Trim broad index to reduce concentration.
Add a high-quality tech stock for stability.
Hold a larger cash buffer for safety.
conservative.read: This plan prioritizes capital preservation with lower expected monthly gains. Risk is reduced by cutting leverage and diversifying away from concentrated tech.

plan: Trim leveraged ETF exposure to a minimal level.
Reduce concentration in semiconductors.
Trim broad index to meet concentration limits.
Increase broad index exposure for diversification.
Add a high-quality tech stock for growth.
Initiate a small position in a top scanner setup.
balanced.read: This balanced approach aims for moderate growth while managing risk. It reduces leverage and concentration, blending index exposure with quality tech and a small, high-potential new name.

plan: Increase position in leveraged semiconductor ETF.
Boost allocation to semiconductors.
Trim broad index to allow for sector concentration.
Add to the strong-performing AI/Software name.
Initiate a position in a high-quality tech name.
Add another strong semiconductor name from scanner.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan seeks higher growth by increasing leverage and concentrating in high-potential areas. Expect larger potential gains but also significantly higher risk and drawdowns, amplified by leverage and daily ETF decay.

plan: Sell all leveraged and high-beta single names.
Exit volatile semiconductor exposure.
Significantly increase allocation to income ETF.
Add broad index for stability and distributions.
Introduce an energy name for income diversification.
Maintain a substantial cash buffer.
income.read: This plan prioritizes stable monthly income and capital preservation over growth. It shifts away from volatile tech and leverage towards income-generating assets, accepting lower potential returns for reduced risk.
